testcase.name: test_add_social_message
testcase.failure: tests/test_news_social.py:352: in test_add_social_message assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to add message: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to add message: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","account_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"platform":"facebook","message_type":"comment","sender_name":"TEST_User","sender_id":"test_sender_123","content":"TEST_This is a test comment","priority":"normal"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_update_message_status
testcase.failure: tests/test_news_social.py:375: in test_update_message_status assert create_response.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_update_message_priority
testcase.failure: tests/test_news_social.py:403: in test_update_message_priority assert create_response.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_reply_to_message
testcase.failure: tests/test_news_social.py:431: in test_reply_to_message assert create_response.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
